That is so cheap compared to lego
And Máster Grade is 60-100$ (because they have entire inner frames and different features, some have lights and some transform)
Perfect Grades are the most expensive with going for up to 600$ depending on the seller

For good reason: the PG kits all have every single detail like opening parts, metal frames, lights, mechanisms, they're the height of a tall toddler and they have every single line and detail, and every part has some kind of function
They take days to months to build
If you are referring to the PG Unleashed RX-93 Nu Gundam, that kit is much larger, featuring over 2,400 parts (comprising 1,200+ plastic pieces per base build + accessories)
